description_long: This is a modern, L-shaped cabinet or shelving unit featuring a combination of wood and white finishes. The structure includes a tall vertical section on the right, likely for storage or display, and a horizontal section with two lower compartments and an upper cubby. The wood panels have a rich, natural grain, while the white surfaces provide a clean, contemporary contrast. The cabinet appears to have multiple doors, some possibly with glass panels, and is designed to be mounted against a wall. Its overall design suggests it is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways.
description: A modern L-shaped cabinet with wood and white finishes, featuring multiple compartments and doors, suitable for wall mounting.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile and depth of the cabinet, with wood and white surfaces visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view revealing the L-shaped layout, wood grain panels, and compartment arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view highlighting the white exterior and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a mostly white, flat back panel with minimal visible features.
